summary.en: Figma / Sketch / paper prototype with linked screens — looks real, isn't. Used for unmoderated and moderated usability testing of a specific user journey before any code.
summary.zh: 用 Figma / Sketch / 纸面做的有跳转的原型 —— 看起来像真的,但不是。用于在写代码之前对一段具体旅程做有指导或无指导的可用性测试。

sources.label: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · Discovery / Clickable Prototype
Steve Krug · Rocket Surgery Made Easy · New Riders · 2010

headline.en: A click can reveal whether the feature deserves to exist.
headline.zh: 一次点击就能暴露功能是否值得存在。

story.en: After a concierge test showed strong interest from sellers, realtor.com ran a follow-on feature-stub experiment: a link to a not-yet-existing 'Selling-Tools' area appeared in the app. Clicks on the stub helped the team test whether the concept belonged in the product before investing in a full feature set.
story.zh: 在 Concierge 实验显示卖房用户有强烈兴趣后，realtor.com 做了一个后续的功能桩测试：在应用里放出一个指向尚不存在的「Selling-Tools」区域的链接。用户是否点击这个入口，帮助团队判断这个概念是否应该进入产品，而不是先投入完整功能开发。

examples.source: Bland & Osterwalder · Testing Business Ideas · Wiley · 2019 · realtor.com case study, pp. 252-253; Clickable Prototype, pp. 236-239

text.en:
Replace this with one fragile flow assumption.

e.g. [Target users] can understand and complete [core workflow] in a digital interface without us explaining the product.
text.zh:
替换成一条最脆弱的流程假设。

例如：[目标用户] 不需要我们解释产品，就能在数字界面中理解并完成 [核心流程]。

text.en:
We believe [target users] can complete [core task] through the proposed flow.

To verify, we will test 8 users on a Figma / Framer clickable prototype within 1 week.

And measure task completion, time-on-task, misclicks, requests for help, and value comprehension.

We are right if ≥ 6/8 complete all critical tasks without facilitator hints.
text.zh:
我们相信 [目标用户] 能通过拟议流程完成 [核心任务]。

为了验证，我们将 在 1 周内用 Figma / Framer 可点击原型测试 8 位用户。

并测量 任务完成率、完成时间、误点、求助次数和价值理解。

如果 ≥ 6/8 无需主持人提示完成所有关键任务 = 通过。

text.en:
Prototype: build only the critical path: entry, decision, action, confirmation, plus one error / empty state. Use realistic copy and data; avoid decorative fidelity.

Recruit: 8 ICP users who have done [job] in the last 30 days. Run 30-minute moderated sessions over Zoom, Maze, or Useberry.

Run: give 3 scenario tasks, ask users to think aloud, and stay silent unless they are blocked for 60 seconds. Record screen, clicks, time, and the exact words users use to explain what the product does.
text.zh:
原型：只做关键路径：入口、决策、行动、确认，再加一个错误 / 空状态。使用真实文案和数据，不追求装饰性高保真。

招募：8 位最近 30 天内做过 [任务] 的 ICP 用户。用 Zoom、Maze 或 Useberry 跑 30 分钟主持式测试。

执行：给 3 个场景任务，让用户边做边说；除非卡住 60 秒，否则主持人保持沉默。记录屏幕、点击、耗时，以及用户解释产品价值的原话。

text.en:
Pass: ≥ 6/8 finish all critical tasks without hints; median task time ≤ [target]; ≥ 6 can explain the value in their own words.

Fail: ≥ 3 users miss the primary CTA, misinterpret the offer, or need facilitator explanation.

Inconclusive: task success is high but value explanation is weak; rewrite copy and retest 5 users.
text.zh:
通过：≥ 6/8 无提示完成所有关键任务；任务耗时中位数 ≤ [目标]；≥ 6 人能用自己的话说清价值。

失败：≥ 3 人错过主 CTA、误解提供物，或需要主持人解释。

不清晰：任务完成率高但价值解释弱；重写文案后再测 5 位。

text.en:
Fill in after running.

Completed all tasks: __ /8; Median time: __ ; Hint count: __ ; Value-understanding count: __ /8.

Most confusing screen: __ . Strongest user quote: __ . Verdict: validated / invalidated / inconclusive.
text.zh:
实验后填写。

完成全部任务：__ /8；耗时中位数：__；提示次数：__；理解价值人数：__ /8。

最困惑页面：__。最强用户原话：__。结论：已验证 / 已证伪 / 不清晰。

text.en:
Pick one based on the result.

• Persevere → run a Smoke Test or Wizard of Oz using the strongest flow.
• Pivot → revise information architecture / copy and retest 5 users.
• Kill → if users cannot understand the value after two prototype rounds, return to Customer Interviews.
text.zh:
根据结果选一个。

• Persevere → 用最强流程跑 Smoke Test 或 Wizard of Oz。
• Pivot → 修改信息架构 / 文案，再测 5 位。
• Kill → 两轮原型后用户仍无法理解价值，回到客户访谈。
